scripts.dev:app: node tools/dev/ensure-env.mjs && node tools/dev/wait-for-db.mjs && node tools/dev/ensure-api-port-free.mjs && turbo run dev --filter=@tracked/api --filter=@tracked/webapp
scripts.dev:api: node tools/dev/wait-for-db.mjs && node tools/dev/ensure-api-port-free.mjs && pnpm --filter @tracked/shared build && pnpm --filter @tracked/api dev
scripts.infra:up: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env up -d postgres redis minio
scripts.dev:all: pnpm infra:up && pnpm db:migrate && pnpm dev:api
scripts.dev:public: node -e "const net = require('net'); const checkPort = (port) => new Promise((resolve) => { const server = net.createServer(); server.listen(port, () => { server.close(() => resolve(true)); }); server.on('error', () => resolve(false)); }); checkPort(5173).then((isOpen) => { if (!isOpen) { console.log('⚠️  Port 5173 is not listening. Start webapp first:'); console.log('   pnpm dev:webapp'); process.exit(1); } console.log('✅ Port 5173 is listening'); console.log(''); console.log('📋 Next steps:'); console.log(''); console.log('1. Start ngrok tunnel:'); console.log('   ngrok http 5173'); console.log(''); console.log('2. Copy the public URL from ngrok (e.g., https://xxxx.ngrok-free.app)'); console.log(''); console.log('3. Add to .env:'); console.log('   TELEGRAM_WEBAPP_URL=https://xxxx.ngrok-free.app'); console.log(''); console.log('4. Start bot:'); console.log('   BOT_TOKEN=your_token pnpm --filter @tracked/bot start'); console.log(''); console.log('📖 Full runbook: docs/runbooks/telegram-dev.md'); });"
scripts.verify:infra: echo 'Infra check: run docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml ps'
